success_definition: External platform proof requires A-G evidence_scope=external_platform. Local daemon proof requires A-G evidence_scope=local_daemon or stronger. Full return proof also requires every answer pickup to be delivered back to its origin dash artifact.

criteria.requirement: A new chat exists in any Aeye anywhere.
A new query was submitted to an Aeye.

query.title: What proof is required before a packet can be marked complete?
query.body: What proof is required before a packet can be marked complete?

query.title: Validate Command Dash to Aeye relay
query.body: Local smoke packet proving Command Dash writes a canonical dispatch packet and mirrors it into an Aeye inbox.
query.action: Validate that Command Dash can reach a local Aeye inbox

query.title: Fresh Aeye loop canary
query.body: Fresh canary generated at 2026-06-28T19:07:33.272Z. This packet must leave Command Dash, reach a local Aeye daemon, receive an answer, and return to Command Dash.
query.action: Prove a fresh Command Dash packet returns to origin dash

query.title: Fresh Aeye loop canary
query.body: Fresh canary generated at 2026-06-28T19:14:49.261Z. This packet must leave Command Dash, reach a local Aeye daemon, receive an answer, and return to Command Dash.
query.action: Prove a fresh Command Dash packet returns to origin dash

query.title: Prove Speaker is consulted before Nerdkle relay
query.body: Fresh kernel proof packet: consult Speaker causal memory, attach the advisory warning entries, deliver to Thufir@Sally, receive a local answer, and return it to the origin dash evidence bus.
query.action: Prove Speaker context is attached before a packet reaches a local Aeye

criteria.requirement: Activity originated from Nerdkle Organism prompting.
A packet left the local Command Dash / TinkerDen relay.

local_only_activity.note: Local Aeye daemon loop is proven. This still does not prove a third-party Aeye platform chat.

origin_return.note: Every answer pickup row has a delivered response back to its origin dash artifact.
